Cta.iteration-1.tsx.description: Split asymmetric layout — testimonial and quote anchored left with secondary background, bold headline and CTA buttons stacked right with strong visual hierarchy

Cta.iteration-2.tsx.description: Stacked center-aligned — testimonial and quote stacked vertically with headline below, full-width card with unified spacing and dual buttons side-by-side

Cta.iteration-3.tsx.description: Compact horizontal — quote in tight left sidebar, headline and stacked CTA buttons on right with tighter spacing for premium density

PlaygroundChatInput.iteration-1.tsx.description: Light card chat input faithful to playground reference — warm white card, Anthropic icon, textarea, and model/action toolbar

PlaygroundChatInput.iteration-2.tsx.description: Dark glass chat input — deep zinc card, glowing accent icon, soft border, monospace aesthetic

PlaygroundChatInput.iteration-3.tsx.description: Brutalist terminal-style chat input — sharp corners, monospace, high-contrast monochrome with green send

FriendlyPromptInput.iteration-1.tsx.description: Welcoming card with suggestion chips — large friendly greeting, clickable quick-action pills, and a simple input for non-technical users

FriendlyPromptInput.iteration-2.tsx.description: Search-bar style — centered Google-like input with example prompts below, ultra-familiar pattern for non-technical users

FriendlyPromptInput.iteration-3.tsx.description: Skill-card picker — visual grid of clickable design actions with optional custom input, making skills discoverable without typing slash commands

FloatingChat.iteration-1.tsx.description: Cursor-inspired floating chat panel — dark glass UI with smooth open/close animations, message thread, model selector, and intuitive floating UX

CursorChatRedesign.iteration-1.tsx.description: Redesigned cursor chat with model avatar header, element chips, draft mode toggle, and Edit/Explore mode buttons matching the new design spec

CursorChatPanel.iteration-1.tsx.description: Cursor-style floating chat with model avatar bubble, element chips, Edit/Explore mode toggle, Riff mode, iteration count dragger, and keyboard hints — three states matching the design spec

ProCta.iteration-1.tsx.description: Proof-First Stack — PRO ribbon header, testimonial anchored at top for social proof, benefit 2×2 grid with descriptions, prominent full-width CTA footer

ProCta.iteration-2.tsx.description: Dark Split — inverted dark left panel with PRO badge, headline, and CTA; warm light right panel with testimonial and vertical benefit list; bold contrast forces left-to-right scan

ProCta.iteration-3.tsx.description: Layered Tiers — three distinct horizontal bands: compact testimonial strip, headline + 4-item benefit grid, accent-tinted CTA band with tagline

TeamPage.iteration-2.tsx.description: Featured editorial split — co-founders get a large two-column portrait feature with oversized names, contributors sit in a compact three-column strip below a labeled divider; asymmetric visual hierarchy distinguishes leadership from contributors

TeamPage.iteration-3.tsx.description: Card grid layout — each member rendered as a warm portrait card in a responsive 2-column grid; centered avatar, name, role pill badge, full bio; visually distinct from list/row approaches

TeamPage.iteration-4.tsx.description: Bold numbered roster — large muted index numbers anchor each row; wide two-column layout with avatar + name/role on the left and bio in a generous right column; monumental editorial spacing makes each member feel distinct and important

TeamPage.iteration-5.tsx.description: Role-grouped sections — members are clustered under bold role headings (Founders / Editors / Podcast) with a divider label; within each group members appear in a clean 2-column grid of compact bio cards; hierarchical grouping replaces flat list ordering

TeamPage.iteration-6.tsx.description: Dark inverted spotlight — deep charcoal background with warm cream text; each member lives in a full-width dark card with a large square avatar, oversized serif name, role in small-caps orange accent, and bio in light weight; inverts the default warm cream palette for a premium feel
